title: $rose() and $fell() are defined on the LSB of their arguments only

features.name: multi_bit_signal_rose_fell
features.description: Code should include multi-bit signal with $rose() or $fell() functions where LSB changes but entire value is non-zero

features.name: rose_fell_entire_value_vs_lsb
features.description: Code should include $rose() or $fell() used on multi-bit value where comparison should be LSB-only but incorrect implementation checks entire value
